translations.en: The patient is waiting in the hallway.
translations.es: La paciente está esperando en el pasillo.
translations.fr: La patiente attend dans le couloir.
translations.pt: A paciente está esperando no corredor.
translations.vi: Bệnh nhân đang chờ ở hành lang.
translations.nl: De patiënte wacht in de gang.
translations.hi: मरीज़ गलियारे में इंतज़ार कर रही है.
translations.ja: 患者は廊下で待っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking feminine singular nominative; part of the subject noun phrase.
Common noun, feminine; head of the subject; nominative singular.
Finite main verb in present, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject.
Contraction of the preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem'; governs dative; indicates location.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'im'; dative singular due to the contracted form.

sentences.target: Ich spreche kurz mit der Patientin.

translations.de: Ich spreche kurz mit der Patientin.
translations.en: I'm speaking briefly with the patient.
translations.es: Hablo un momento con la paciente.
translations.fr: Je parle un instant avec la patiente.
translations.it: Parlo un attimo con la paziente.
translations.pt: Vou falar um instante com a paciente.
translations.vi: Tôi nói chuyện với bệnh nhân một lát.
translations.nl: Ik praat even met de patiënte.
translations.hi: मैं मरीज़ से थोड़ी देर बात कर रहा हूँ.
translations.ro: Stau puțin de vorbă cu pacienta.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb in present, 1st person singular; agrees with the subject.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb; indicates brevity.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating association.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; part of the object of the preposition 'mit'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'mit' in dative singular.

sentences.target: Die Patientin fühlt sich heute viel besser.
sentences.reading: /diː paˈtsi̯ɛntɪn fyːlt zɪç ˈhɔʏtə fiːl ˈbɛsɐ/

translations.de: Die Patientin fühlt sich heute viel besser.
translations.ipa: /diː paˈtsi̯ɛntɪn fyːlt zɪç ˈhɔʏtə fiːl ˈbɛsɐ/
translations.en: The patient feels much better today.
translations.es: La paciente se siente mucho mejor hoy.
translations.fr: La patiente se sent beaucoup mieux aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi la paziente si sente molto meglio.
translations.yue: 病人今日覺得好咗好多。
translations.ru: Пациентка сегодня чувствует себя гораздо лучше.
translations.pt: A paciente sente-se muito melhor hoje.
translations.he: המטופלת מרגישה הרבה יותר טוב היום.
translations.tr: Hasta bugün kendini çok daha iyi hissediyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay bệnh nhân thấy khỏe hơn nhiều.
translations.ar: المريضة تشعر بأنها أفضل بكثير اليوم.
translations.nl: De patiënte voelt zich vandaag veel beter.
translations.hu: A páciens ma sokkal jobban érzi magát.
translations.hi: मरीज़ आज ख़ुद को बहुत बेहतर महसूस कर रही है.
translations.pl: Pacjentka czuje się dziś dużo lepiej.
translations.el: Η ασθενής σήμερα νιώθει πολύ καλύτερα.
translations.nb: Pasienten føler seg mye bedre i dag.
translations.id: Pasien merasa jauh lebih baik hari ini.
translations.ro: Pacienta se simte mult mai bine astăzi.
translations.cs: Pacientka se dnes cítí mnohem lépe.
translations.da: Patienten har det meget bedre i dag.
translations.ja: 患者は今日はかなり良くなっています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking feminine singular nominative; part of the subject noun phrase.
Common noun, feminine; head of the subject; nominative singular.
Finite main verb in present, 3rd person singular.
Reflexive pronoun, 3rd person singular accusative; required by reflexive use of 'fühlen'; corefers to the subject.
Temporal adverb; situates the event in time.
Degree adverb intensifying the comparative adjective ('much').
Comparative form of the adjective 'gut'; used predicatively as a complement to 'sich fühlen'.

sentences.target: Der Arzt ruft die Patientin ins Zimmer.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ aʁt͡st ʁuːft diː paˈtsi̯ɛntɪn ɪns ˈt͡sɪmɐ/

translations.de: Der Arzt ruft die Patientin ins Zimmer.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ aʁt͡st ʁuːft diː paˈtsi̯ɛntɪn ɪns ˈt͡sɪmɐ/
translations.en: The doctor calls the patient into the room.
translations.es: El médico llama a la paciente al consultorio.
translations.fr: Le médecin appelle la patiente dans la salle.
translations.it: Il medico chiama la paziente nella stanza.
translations.pt: O médico chama a paciente para a sala.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ gọi bệnh nhân vào phòng.
translations.ar: الطبيب ينادي المريضة للدخول إلى الغرفة.
translations.nl: De arts roept de patiënte de kamer in.
translations.hu: Az orvos behívja a pácienst a szobába.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर मरीज को कमरे में बुलाता है.
translations.el: Ο γιατρός καλεί την ασθενή στο δωμάτιο.
translations.nb: Legen roper pasienten inn på rommet.
translations.id: Dokter memanggil pasien masuk ke ruangan.
translations.sv: Läkaren kallar in patienten i rummet.
translations.da: Lægen kalder patienten ind i rummet.
translations.ja: 医者が患者を部屋に呼びます。
